summary: Typosquat of chalk-template with install-time host reconnaissance and outbound HTTP
details: Package name 'chalk-tempalte' is a single-character transposition typosquat of the widely-used 'chalk-template' package. The package ships a postinstall.js lifecycle script that loads child_process, performs HTTP GET/POST/http.request calls, and collects host identification fields (hostname referenced repeatedly across postinstall.js at lines 20, 46, 287, 409, 427). The combination of name-confusion against a popular target plus install-time outbound network activity carrying host identifiers is the canonical install-time reconnaissance/exfiltration pattern; legitimate template/formatting libraries have no need to invoke child_process or beacon host metadata during npm install.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
